user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Glossier
Product type: Cloud Paint blush
Tone: fresh, approachable, youthful
Visual style: Soft, airy visuals with pastel hues and natural lighting that emphasize a dewy, effortless beauty look.
Conceptual technique: authentic user-generated content showcasing real people in everyday moments
Format: image

brief.headline: Blush Rush: Captured in the Cloud
brief.caption: Real people apply Cloud Paint blush in spontaneous, candid moments—on a subway, in a café, or during a video call—highlighting its ease of use and natural finish.
brief.visual_style: Soft, airy visuals with pastel hues and natural lighting that emphasize a dewy, effortless beauty look.
brief.conceptual_technique: authentic user-generated content showcasing real people in everyday moments
brief.typography_style: Clean, rounded sans-serif with a handwritten touch for authenticity
brief.color_scheme: soft pinks, corals, and muted blush tones with Glossier's signature white
